assertions.title: Dark mode is default with no light flash

steps.action: Open / in a fresh browser session, clear cookies/localStorage, reload, and capture initial screenshot
steps.observed: Initial screenshot remained dark (charcoal background, light text)

steps.action: Wait for settled state and capture second screenshot
steps.expected: Settled UI remains dark with no intermediate light state
steps.observed: Settled screenshot matches dark theme tokens

steps.expected: Dark background and light foreground token values
steps.observed: body background rgb(17, 19, 22), body color rgb(243, 244, 246), colorScheme dark

evidence.network: Route navigation to GET / on localhost completed; request-level status codes not exposed by agent-browser in this run

steps.action: Desktop viewport (1440x900): traverse Home→About→Projects→Blog→Contact using nav links
steps.expected: All primary routes reachable with visible, accessible controls
steps.observed: All routes reachable via nav; screenshots captured per route

steps.action: Mobile viewport (390x844): open menu toggle and navigate to primary routes
steps.expected: Mobile controls usable and routes reachable
steps.observed: Toggle exposed menu items Home/About/Projects/Blog/Contact and routes were reachable

steps.action: Measure nav clipping/overlap via bounding checks
steps.expected: No clipping or overflow for nav controls
steps.observed: clippedLinks=[] on desktop and mobile; nav scrollWidth equals clientWidth in both checks

evidence.network: Navigation across /, /about, /projects, /blog, /contact on localhost completed in desktop and mobile viewports

steps.action: Sample representative body text styles on About and Blog routes
steps.expected: Body text uses configured sans-serif stack
steps.observed: Body headings/text use Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
Metadata uses JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Consolas, Courier New, monospace

steps.action: Sample code element styles on Blog route
steps.observed: Code sample (/blog inline code) uses JetBrains Mono/Fira Code monospace stack

evidence.network: Typography checks executed on /about and /blog via local route loads

assertions.title: Accent color token is consistently applied

steps.action: Capture accent token and representative accent element colors on multiple primary routes
steps.expected: Consistent red accent token across links/borders/headings

steps.action: Compare active nav and heading accent styles
steps.expected: Same red token applied to active nav and heading accent border
steps.observed: activeNavColor rgb(225, 29, 72) and heading accent border include rgb(225, 29, 72) across sampled routes

evidence.network: Route loads for /, /about, /projects, /blog, /contact completed while sampling computed colors

steps.expected: Each route renders route-specific content and shared shell
steps.observed: Each direct-load had header nav present and route-specific h1 (About/Projects/Blog/Contact)

steps.expected: Deterministic traversal with no runtime errors
steps.observed: Traversal succeeded with expected URLs at each step

steps.action: Collect full console and uncaught error logs after traversal
steps.observed: Console contained only Vite debug connect logs; agent-browser errors returned no entries

evidence.consoleErrors: none (uncaught errors). Console log only showed repeated '[debug] [vite] connecting...' and '[debug] [vite] connected.' entries during local dev navigation.
evidence.network: Direct route opens and nav traversal completed for /about, /projects, /blog, /contact, /

frictions.description: On /projects, semantic locator find role link click --name "Blog" matched both nav Blog and a content link (Live Blog Route), causing strict-mode ambiguity.
frictions.resolution: Switched to snapshot refs and clicked the nav Blog element by reference to continue validation deterministically.
